title: poa trivialis subsp. balearica
intro: Poa trivialis subsp. balearica, also known as the Balearic meadow-grass, is a subspecies of the common meadow-grass plant (Poa trivialis) that is native to the Balearic Islands. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Poa trivialis subsp. balearica include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used in traditional medicine to harness its medicinal properties.
